headline: DTE Energy Q1 Earnings Call Highlights
summary: DTE Energy (NYSE:DTE) executives said the company got off to a “strong start” in 2026, pointing to first-quarter operating earnings of $1.95 per share, continued progress on electric reliability and an expanding pipeline of large-load data center agreements that management said could provide increme

headline: DTE sees up to 8.4 GW data center opportunity
summary: The utility will supply a 1.4-GW Oracle data center under construction now, and it has submitted contracts to regulators for a 1-GW Google project also in the works.
